hub.hero.title: A New Dawn Has Arrived
hub.hero.subtitle: Learning is everyone's right. Here, you can learn anything, anytime, and absolutely free. Free your mind!
hub.books.title: Available Books
interstitial.title: Authenticating...
about.philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
about.philosophy.body: Knowledge is a shared commons and a fundamental right, not a commodity to be hoarded or paywalled. We exist to make high-quality, autodidactic learning a reality for everyone.
about.why.title: Why Dawnbook Exists
about.why.body: Dawnbook was built to actively reduce the education gap and reject exploitative paywalled models. By dismantling financial barriers, we ensure that free and open access is the baseline, not a premium feature.
about.core.title: Core Principles
about.core.1: Absolutely free with no hidden cost.
about.core.2: Driven by open collaboration and contribution from a worldwide community.
about.core.4: Fostering lifelong learning and the critical thinking necessary to pursue truth independently.
about.motif.title: The Dawn Motif
about.motif.body: The dawn signifies the end of the night and the arrival of a new era of freedom. It represents our profound belief that the light of education should reach every corner of the world, illuminating minds and liberating individuals.
contribute.join.title: Join the Authors
contribute.join.body1: We believe knowledge should be free and openly collaborative. You can contribute by writing a new chapter, fixing typos, or even starting a brand new book.
contribute.join.body2: All contributions are managed via GitHub Pull Requests, ensuring a high standard of quality through peer review.
signin.title: Sign In to Continue Reading
signin.body: Create a free account or sign in to access the full book content.
signin.loading: Authentication is being configured. Please try again shortly.
donate.title: Support Dawnbook
donate.subtitle: Your generosity helps us deliver free books to school libraries and community reading spaces in underserved regions (3T areas).
